LockBank_KILL - Static variable in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF

LockBank_TID - Static variable in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF

lockMem(String, int, int, int, String, String) - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.ble.RFIDWithUHFBLEOfLiunx
 
lockMem(String, String) - Method in class com.rscja.deviceapi.ble.RFIDWithUHFBLEOfLiunx
 
lockMem(String, int, int, int, String, String) - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
锁指定标签(Lock specified label) 示例代码:比如锁定EPC区和USER区 (Sample code: such as locking EPC area and USER area) List lockBank=new ArrayList<>(); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_EPC); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_USER); int lockMode =IUHF.LockMode_LOCK; String hexLockCode=generateLockCode(lockBank,lockMode); lockMem(accessPwd,bank,ptr,cnt,filterData,hexLockCode);
lockMem(String, String) - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
锁标签(lock label) 示例代码:比如锁定EPC区和USER区 (Sample code: such as locking EPC area and USER area) List lockBank=new ArrayList<>(); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_EPC); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_USER); int lockMode =IUHF.LockMode_LOCK; String hexLockCode=generateLockCode(lockBank,lockMode); lockMem(accessPwd,hexLockCode);

lockMem(String, String, List) - Method in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHFAxJson

锁标签(lock label) 示例代码:比如锁定EPC区和USER区 (Sample code: such as locking EPC area and USER area) List lockBank=new ArrayList<>(); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_EPC); lockBank.add(IUHF.LockBank_USER); int lockMode =IUHF.LockMode_LOCK; String hexLockCode=generateLockCode(lockBank,lockMode); lockMem(accessPwd,hexLockCode);

LockMode_LOCK - Static variable in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
锁定模式:锁定(LOCK mode: lock)
LockMode_OPEN - Static variable in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
锁定模式:开放(LOCK mode: Release)
LockMode_PLOCK - Static variable in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
锁定模式:永久锁定(LOCK mode: Permanent LOCK)
LockMode_POPEN - Static variable in interface com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces.IUHF
锁定模式:永久开放(LOCK mode: Permanent release)
